overall.description: A nighttime first-person walk beneath an urban highway overpass transitioning to an open waterfront promenade. The camera moves from a dark enclosed concrete corridor to a riverside walkway with city lights reflecting on water, featuring a prominent illuminated skyscraper with '02' signage.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward through the dark enclosed space under the overpass

entered.detail: elevated highway structure overhead with visible support beams
thick concrete column supporting the overpass deck
city buildings with scattered lights visible in the distance beyond the overpass

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a dark walk beneath a highway overpass. Concrete pillars pass by on either side as the camera moves forward through the enclosed corridor. Distant city lights are visible ahead through the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area emerging from under overpass to waterfront

events.description: night sky becomes visible as the camera exits the covered overpass area
tall illuminated skyscraper with 02 logo comes into view ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the enclosed space opens up to reveal the waterfront and city skyline

entered.detail: prominent skyscraper with illuminated 02 signage near the top
dark water reflecting city lights along the waterfront

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from under the overpass into a more open area. The night sky becomes visible above, and a tall glass tower with '02' signage dominates the view ahead. Water appears on the right side with reflections of city lights, while the overpass structure recedes to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban waterfront promenade with overhead bridge structure

events.description: camera slows slightly to capture the waterfront reflections

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade with the bridge structure to the left and water to the right

entered.detail: commercial buildings with bright vertical neon signs in various colors
metal railing along the edge of the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows an open waterfront promenade at night. The camera walks along the water with colorful neon signs from commercial buildings illuminating the scene ahead. The overpass structure remains visible to the left with its railing, while water reflections create patterns of light on the surface below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, enclosed concrete corridor into a vibrant, open waterfront promenade at night. It begins with a walk beneath a highway overpass, passing heavy concrete pillars while distant city lights glimmer ahead through the structure. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the night sky opens up and a tall glass tower with prominent '02' signage dominates the horizon. The scene then shifts toward the water's edge on the right, where the overpass recedes to the left and city lights begin to reflect on the surface. Finally, the camera glides along the promenade, moving past colorful neon signs from commercial buildings that illuminate the riverside walkway.
